# Workout Image Filenames

Add workout media in this folder using any of these extensions: `.jpg`, `.png`, `.webp`, `.jpeg`, `.gif`, or `.mp4`.

Use these filenames:

- Arm Circles -> `arm-circles.jpg`
- Bench Press -> `bench-press.jpg`
- Bicep Curls -> `bicep-curls.jpg`
- Bicycle Crunches -> `bicycle-crunches.jpg`
- Boxing Punches -> `boxing-punches.jpg`
- Brisk Walking -> `brisk-walking.jpg`
- Burpees -> `burpees.jpg`
- Calf Raises -> `calf-raises.jpg`
- Chest Flyes -> `chest-flyes.jpg`
- Cool Down Stretch -> `cool-down-stretch.jpg`
- Cool Down Walk -> `cool-down-walk.jpg`
- Deadlifts -> `deadlifts.jpg`
- Dumbbell Rows -> `dumbbell-rows.jpg`
- Face Pulls -> `face-pulls.jpg`
- Farmer Walks -> `farmer-walks.jpg`
- Flutter Kicks -> `flutter-kicks.jpg`
- Glute Bridges -> `glute-bridges.jpg`
- Goblet Squats -> `goblet-squats.jpg`
- Hammer Curls -> `hammer-curls.jpg`
- High Knees -> `high-knees.jpg`
- Jump Rope -> `jump-rope.jpg`
- Jump Squats -> `jump-squats.jpg`
- Jumping Jacks -> `jumping-jacks.jpg`
- Lateral Raises -> `lateral-raises.jpg`
- Leg Curls -> `leg-curls.jpg`
- Leg Press -> `leg-press.jpg`
- Leg Raises -> `leg-raises.jpg`
- Lunges -> `lunges.jpg`
- Mountain Climbers -> `mountain-climbers.jpg`
- Plank -> `plank.jpg`
- Plank Hold -> `plank-hold.jpg`
- Pull-ups -> `pull-ups.jpg`
- Pushups -> `pushups.jpg`, `pushups.gif`, or `pushups.mp4`
  Source link provided: https://lottiefiles.com/free-animations/push-up
- Running in Place -> `running-in-place.jpg`
- Russian Twists -> `russian-twists.jpg`
- Shoulder Press -> `shoulder-press.jpg`
- Side Plank -> `side-plank.jpg`
- Squat Thrusts -> `squat-thrusts.jpg`
- Squats -> `squats.jpg`
- Step-ups -> `step-ups.jpg`
- Superman -> `superman.jpg`
- Tricep Dips -> `tricep-dips.jpg`
- Wall Sit -> `wall-sit.jpg`
